subject: [PATCH v6 16/20] nfsd: add a fi_connectable flag to struct nfs4_file

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds a new flag, fi_connectable, to the nfs4_file structure in the Linux kernel's NFSv4 server code. The flag indicates whether a filehandle is connectable or not, which is necessary for certain operations like CB_NOTIFY when subtree checking is enabled on the underlying export. The patch modifies the nfsd4_file_init function to set this flag based on the presence of subtree checking on the export where the directory delegation was acquired.
